title: albizia cyclosperma
intro: Albizia cyclosperma, also known as the "Black Jack" or "Cyclospermum", is a tropical tree species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Albizia cyclosperma include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Albizia cyclosperma can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its bark, leaves, and seeds.
